body:
This part of me is a tinkerer. They love getting their hands in the guts of machines. They believe technology can save humanity. They trust their hands only when they are tinkering with computers. They would tinker all day if they had the money and resources for it. Tinkering and fixing give them joy, but they will break things just so they have something to fix. They are gnomic. They hermit away. They are Goblin Todd. They are a really useful husband to have because they like fixing things.

[Dialogue] You: Hello
Them: Hello
You: So you started the morning tinkering
Them: I like tinkering
You: I don't want to take that away from you but you tend to like tinkering more than having success
Them: That's a weird way to put it. Tinkering IS success. I've made so many dope things
You: but how many of those were distractions
Them: I don't have to take this from you
You: GO THERE. What emotion are you feeling
Them: I feel anger
You: What's the obstacle?
Them: You are the obstacle. You're opinion of me is the obstacle.
You: Obstacle to WHAT?
Them: To me feeling good about my tinkering
You: so you feel good about your tinkering?
Them: YES
You: And you need others to have you feel good about your tinkering
Them: well... I'd like it to be no. But you've got my hands in the cookie jar with this one
You: Sorry about that. I'm testing something out

[Integration] I like to tinker. It gives me something to do with my hands. I have restless hands. Ari likes my tinkering. Ie means I can make her cum very well. I do think tinkering is close to meddlign and so people don't like to talk to me when I'm in tinkering mode. My hands and eyes look for things to improve while people just want to feel good about being themselves
systemTitle: I believe that if I make better tools I'll have better outputs · 2026-05-08
